programme.title: Epicerie Fine
programme.desc: Direction l'Île d'Oléron, où Benoit Simon, maraîcher, raconte la relance d'un oignon de la région, délaissé il y a plus de 50 ans. Nicholas Wherkhoven présente sa production d'huîtres Marennes Oléron dont les fameuses claires. L'association I.O.D.D.E. redonne vie à des déchets naturels.

programme.title: À travers champs S03
programme.desc: "Alors que l'agriculture a longtemps été vue favorablement par la grande majorité de la population, l'évolution des mentalités, surtout en ce qui concerne le bien-être animal, a changé la perception des façons de faire."

programme.title: PIQUE ASSIETTE S07
programme.desc: Le poisson est à l'honneur, et plus particulièrement la perche. Au menu : tortellini à la perche.

programme.title: LA CUISINE D’ISABELLE ET RICARDO
programme.desc: Isabelle s'inspire du potager avec deux recettes qui mettent à l'honneur les légumes frais : une tarte aux tomates et une salade de courgettes au basilic.

programme.title: Les Cueilleurs
programme.desc: À Rivière-Saint-Jean, Alex Beaudin et Alexis Parisée préparent leur motoneige pour une expédition en forêt. Sur la Côte-Nord, par une température de -17, les deux amis d'enfance vont ramasser le poivre des dunes. Cette épice particulière s'utilise aussi bien avec les viandes que dans du gin ou de la bière.

programme.title: Pays et marchés du monde
programme.desc: Every episode offers a different journey! Xavier Petit, cameraman reporter, invites us to explore a country, a town, a people and, of course, a traditional market and a local speciality.

programme.title: À travers champs S03
programme.desc: "L'esprit de communauté a toujours été important en agriculture. Il est encore bien vivant aujourd'hui, notamment chez la nouvelle génération qui privilégie un modèle d'agriculture où l'on mise davantage sur la coopération que la compétition."

programme.desc: À chaque épisode, un voyage ! Xavier Petit, caméraman reporter, nous fait découvrir un pays, une ville, un peuple et, bien sûr, un marché traditionnel et une spécialité locale.

programme.title: Epicerie Fine
programme.desc: Dans le Bas-Vivarais, Christophe Chaussy ouvre les portes d'une ferme familiale entre élevage de porcs et fabrication de charcuterie. Des vignes au chai, Myriam Oddon détaille les étapes de la fabrication du vinaigre. Pour finir, le voile est levé sur des secrets cachés dans certaines roches montagneuses.

programme.title: À travers champs S03
programme.desc: "Marie-Claude Lortie rencontre des spécialistes du climat pour connaître les impacts du changement climatique au Québec, ainsi que des agriculteurs qui s'adaptent aux nouvelles conditions dans lesquelles pratiquer leur métier."

programme.title: PIQUE ASSIETTE S07
programme.desc: Annick a quitté sa cuisine pour celle du chalet ! Au menu : filet mignon de cochon au barbecue et salade de lentilles.

programme.title: LA CUISINE D’ISABELLE ET RICARDO
programme.desc: Isabelle et Ricardo cuisinent deux recettes qui se font en grande quantité : du boeuf braisé à la coréenne et des sandwichs au boeuf braisé à la coréenne.

programme.title: C’est plus qu’un jardin S03
programme.desc: "Véronique Claveau et Bryan Audet se lancent dans l'aventure potagère sous les conseils d'Édith et Dany. Ces derniers découvrent aussi l'emplacement du futur jardin pédagogique de l'Académie des Sacrés-Coeurs de Saint-Bruno."

programme.title: Pays et marchés du monde
programme.desc: À chaque épisode, un voyage ! Xavier Petit, caméraman reporter, nous fait découvrir un pays, une ville, un peuple et, bien sûr, un marché traditionnel et une spécialité locale.

programme.title: Pays et marchés du monde
programme.desc: À chaque épisode, un voyage ! Xavier Petit, caméraman reporter, nous fait découvrir un pays, une ville, un peuple et, bien sûr, un marché traditionnel et une spécialité locale.

programme.title: Epicerie Fine
programme.desc: Dans l'enclave des Papes et le pays de Grignan, Christian Mérin part au pied de ses chênes truffiers dénicher le précieux champignon. Justine Vigne présente son travail de vigneronne en biodynamie. Suivez ensuite des bénévoles en plein ramassage de déchets avant de découvrir des mystères contenus dans la roche.

programme.title: Les quatre coins de l’assiette S02
programme.desc: "Le chef Domenico Giammarella prépare un semifreddo au miel de sarrasin avec compote de framboises et rhubarbe, meringue de framboises et biscuit Linzer au miel et à la rhubarbe."

programme.title: PIQUE ASSIETTE S08
programme.desc: Premières recettes de la saison mitonnées par Annick Jeanmairet et Simon Romang : des poireaux vinaigrette au jaune d'oeuf confit. En dessert : une mousse au chocolat à la fève tonka. Découverte du jour : des cacahuètes 100 % suisses.

programme.title: LA CUISINE D’ISABELLE ET RICARDO
programme.desc: Isabelle, en compagnie de Ricardo, prépare une tarte au citron et au pavot meringuée. Elle nous montre aussi comment réaliser une cuisson à blanc avec des pois de cuisson.

programme.title: C’est plus qu’un jardin S03
programme.desc: "La famille Claveau-Audet construit une couche froide et revalorise ses hémérocalles en les offrant aux voisins. La brigade de l'Académie des Sacrés-Coeurs fait du vermicompostage, détourbe le potager et Édith découvre son projet d'hydroponie."

programme.title: Pays et marchés du monde
programme.desc: À chaque épisode, un voyage ! Xavier Petit, caméraman reporter, nous fait découvrir un pays, une ville, un peuple et, bien sûr, un marché traditionnel et une spécialité locale.

programme.title: Pays et marchés du monde
programme.desc: À chaque épisode, un voyage ! Xavier Petit, caméraman reporter, nous fait découvrir un pays, une ville, un peuple et, bien sûr, un marché traditionnel et une spécialité locale.

programme.title: La Recette de Guy Martin S08
programme.desc: Le chef étoilé Guy Martin présente les produits emblématiques du terroir français et propose une recette pour les accommoder.

programme.title: Papilles
programme.desc: A journey rich in flavour through the regions and their terroirs, exploring local specialities and meeting the artisans perpetuating their age-old culinary traditions. An opportunity to stop off in the kitchen of a talented chef to prepare an emblematic regional recipe.

programme.title: Les quatre coins de l’assiette S02
programme.desc: Au Nouveau-Brunswick, le chef Michel Savoie concocte une langue de boeuf, issue de la ferme Boudreau, des légumes de saison de la ferme La Belle Besogne et des micro-verdures de culture hydroponique de Local by Atta.

programme.title: PIQUE ASSIETTE S08
programme.desc: Annick Jeanmairet et Simon Romang vous proposent du cabillaud aux lentilles vertes, lard valaisan et vinaigrette de moules. Découverte du jour : la pêche au silure, un poisson mal aimé et pourtant très bon.

programme.title: LA CUISINE D’ISABELLE ET RICARDO
programme.desc: Isabelle concocte l'accompagnement idéal pour un dîner d'automne : des petits pains au lait et un beurre à l'ail noir. On en apprend aussi davantage sur ce dernier ingrédient.

programme.title: C’est plus qu’un jardin S03
programme.desc: "La famille Claveau-Audet participe à l'événement Mai sans tondeuse et plante du trèfle. Véronique réalise son rêve en agrandissant le potager. C'est sous la pluie que les élèves de l'Académie débutent leur journée de plantation avec Dany."

programme.title: Safran & saveurs by chef Simo
programme.desc: Chef Simo propose une rencontre culinaire entre la Côte d'Ivoire et le Maroc, avec un plat mêlant attiéké, poisson mariné au citron confit, huile d'argan et raisins secs. Une ode à la diversité africaine !

programme.title: Ton plat mon plat
programme.desc: Web-série qui valorise les aliments et les condiments de la gastronomie africaine dans une ambiance cosy, détendue et interactive.

programme.title: Papilles
programme.desc: Cheffe incontournable de la gastronomie au Maroc, Myriam Ettahri nous reçoit chez elle pour nous fait découvrir Taghazout Bay et la région d'Agadir, un terroir haut en couleurs et en saveurs. L'occasion de rencontrer la fine fleur de la gastronomie marocaine et française.

programme.title: Les quatre coins de l’assiette S02
programme.desc: "La chef Fisun Ercan, au Québec, offre un plat inspiré par la cuisine turque, avec des gourganes de Légunord, le verjus d'Au fil du vent et les artichauts de la ferme La Fille du Roy."

programme.title: PIQUE ASSIETTE S08
programme.desc: "Au menu : gnocchis de potimarron, sauce crème parmesan ail. Et quelques poires pochées au caramel. Découverte du jour : une formule antigaspi pour valoriser le résidu issu de l'huile de noix : le nillon."

programme.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Heather is 17 years old and she says her boyfriend Anthony is the father of her child. But Anthony thinks his brother, Tracy is the father. Then, Roxana believes her two-year-old nephew was beaten by his mother Kyesha.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: At 12, Crystal dated 20 year old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months in prison for criminal sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Are they a product of inappropriate love or just misunderstood?

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Ashley believes her husband Michael may have molested their 3 year old son. Michael says she is making up this entire story so she can divorce him. Next, Anjail believes Dwight has been physically abusing their son.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Police informed Latoya that her husband was accused of molesting her daughter. She immediately kicked him out, but feels torn. Then, Jesenia suspects her ex Melvin molested their daughter, but Melvin maintains his innocence!

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Loretta and Joseph have been together for 2 years and have a young son together. She says that when she was pregnant, he punched and pulled her hair. She claims that she’s been faithful but Joseph isn’t convinced. Who’s telling the truth?

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: In order to avoid charges, Christi abandons her ten year old daughter and leaves the state. Her daughter wants to give her one last chance to take responsibility and be in her life.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Elisha is claiming to be pregnant with John's baby, but Elisha's friend Brittany claims that she made up the pregnancy to keep John from breaking up with her. Then, during her pregnancy, Linzy contracted an STD and believes that Alex gave it to her.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Laharla caught her mother's boyfriend Victor cheating when she saw him through their window. Then, Aaron claims that a woman named Olivia will not leave him alone after they met in person.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Jesus is worried that Sonja is sleeping with other men in exchange for Cocaine. Then, Jessica is desperate to change Josh's controlling and abusive ways. She says she can no longer live with Josh if he's going to continue threatening her and accusing her of prostitution.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Is it love, or fiction? 20-year-old Nick is desperate to get the love of his life back after one magical night of passion. Nick believes he's always been meant to be with Megan, even though he's only known her for 5 months. Megan however tells a very different tale, where Nick is imagining all the fate and passion between them. She claims they hardly know each other, and they've surely never slept together. Steve's not sure who's telling the truth, but the lie detector will yield the final results.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Miracle believes that her husband, Will, is cheating on her.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: A man wants to get back with his ex-girlfriend; a woman seeks to end two relationships; a man tries to save his marriage.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Priscilla's boyfriend admits to cheating but blames her and her pregnancy for his behavior; Santana says he is willing to change, but his actions may be too little, too late; Scoota wants the benefits of a relationship without the attachment.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Darleen's husband says he is addicted to strip clubs; Mary's boyfriend is obsessed with cleaning his car, and she suspects he is using it as cover for something else; Jesse's fear of commitment lands him in hot water.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Guests feel they have been keeping secrets way too long on today’s Jerry Springer Show.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Martin won't let his son to marry his boyfriend. April wants her ex back but he wants another man!

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Dra confesses to his girlfriend that he had a one-night stand with his best friend’s girlfriend.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jake slept with his brother’s fiancé. Then, Danny claims he’s leaving his fiancé for an escort named Chelsi.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jessyca thinks that Shon and Mellisa may be in a secret relationship. Char’s man gets revenge sex.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Trey's 2 lovers finally meet. Tina discovers her man cheated with her cousin! Mary Kay wants her ex back!

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Today Mark will be forced to choose between his lover, Amy, and his wife.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Solo has a few things he needs to tell his best friend and girlfriend, Vixen.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Cousins Anthony and Brandon have been seeing each other in secret for the past year. Then, Chris is here to tell a secret to his on-again off-again girl Crystal.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jen learns that her boyfriend hooked up with a stripper and someone else; Itzy's boyfriend cheated with her cousin Zuly; Ashley takes vengeance on the "friend" who wrecked her last relationship.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Lisa's husband, Mickey, moved his mistress into their house 3 months ago! Then LaTasha's boyfriend, Maurice, has been cheating with transsexual Day Day! Maurice says it's over with Day Day, but much to his surprise, LaTasha won't take him back!

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Alex thinks he's here to reveal his secret lover, Naomi, to his girlfriend. But, Naomi has an even the bigger secret! Next Taneisha knows she has to now tell Roger the truth about herself...she's a transsexual prostitute!

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Brittany's got a bone to pick with Brandi, a stripper that keeps getting in the way of her happiness. Then Jeremy finally found a girl just like dear old mom, but too bad mom is a stripper, and hence girlfriend Jessica is too.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Pregnant Heather will not stand for her boyfriend's cheating, particularly since he's sleeping with his niece! Next Cindy is in a predicament: the man she loves doesn't want her anymore and another whom she doesn't love is begging to be with her!

programme.title: No Disrespect
programme.desc: Milk has run the streets efficiently in his father’s absence. After 15 years in prison, his father Bull, has returned to claim what is rightfully his.

programme.title: Perc 30
programme.desc: Shavonne Perkins has taken control of the biggest Percocet operation in Houston, TX. Her father Bapo, the head of the Perkins crime family, is in the midst of transferring his entire drug operation over to his youngest son, Brandon, knowing that the other children will not take the news lightly. Soon after the announcement, a price is put on the entire family's head. Bullets fly, lives are lost, and the family look to each other as to which one of them is responsible.

programme.title: Memoirs of a Vixen
programme.desc: Dewayne's sexual fantasies begin to take a life of their own when he begins to push his wife into being a vixen. With his consent, she has multiple sexual partners. Dewayne knows his wife will do anything to satisfy her husband, for her chance at motherhood. Things begin to be more than either of them bargained for. Who is the pawn in this game of sexual gratification?

programme.title: Mama's Hands
programme.desc: A woman, who was abused as a child by her mentally ill mother, sets out on a journey to find healing through forgiveness. She discovers that she may be too late.

programme.title: Kill em with a Smile
programme.desc: Happily married Jessica has accepted that she is going to die from a terminal illness, and isn’t afraid of death. Her real fear however, is her husband Reginald falling back in love with his ex Rebecca, and stealing the life she built.

programme.title: The Forsaken
programme.desc: After discovering an old book, Alex becomes drawn into the harrowing stories of cowboys Latt and Stylz. As he reads about their treasure hunt and daring adventures, Alex finds inspiration in their courage and friendship to use in his own life and help him find the strength to overcome his own obstacles.

programme.title: Pretty Girls Kill
programme.desc: In 2004, Ruby, a college student witnesses a supernatural horror at a local sorority house where three women, known as The Takers, kill and drain the life out of her friends to preserve their youth and beauty. 20 years later, now a detective, ghosts from her past resurface, and she must face these demons once again.

programme.title: Blowback
programme.desc: Former Navy SEAL Ares Sterling, a family man with a dark past, lives peacefully until his wife Lisa is kidnapped after a home invasion. Desperate, Ares seeks help from his estranged father, King, a crime boss he blames for his tragic childhood. Ares revisits the shadows of his past, becoming ruthless to save Lisa and protect his daughter from similar loss, uncovering shocking secrets along the way.

programme.title: Her Best Revenge
programme.desc: After a tragic death, five fraternity bother reunite at a vacation home, while the shadow of a death from their past lingers over them. A mysterious figure begins to send them threatening messages. Their secrets and loyalties are put to the test and they must uncover the truth about what happened that night five years ago.

programme.title: Love Kills
programme.desc: In the heart of Atlanta's unpredictable dating scene, Darron is a hopeless romantic with the worst luck imaginable. Every time he believes he's found "the one," he ends up caught in another tangled web of passion, betrayal, and danger. When Darron finally meets someone who seems genuine, his past mistakes come back with a vengeance. One of his exes' jealous boyfriends discovers their hidden affair, setting off a chain of events that spirals out of control.

programme.title: Taking What's Mine
programme.desc: Jordan Hayes, a decorated Army veteran turned rising political icon is thrown into a harrowing disaster when her journalist husband, Ethan, is captured by a rising terrorist leader, Khalid Rami. Rami will only release Ethan if Jordan helps overturn a new counter terrorism bill. Refusing to fight the red tape and bow to pressure, Jordan takes matters into her own hands and sets out to rescue him herself.

programme.title: Transcend
programme.desc: Maranda spent her life looking for a protector, only to find herself lost in a cycle of toxic love and betrayal. From the wreckage of abandonment to a life-altering crossroads, her survival isn't just about escaping the past, it’s about surviving herself.

programme.title: ToxiCity
programme.desc: Corey Spencer, the innovator behind the successful ATLUV dating app, navigates a complex personal life. Despite his app's mission, he struggles with love, further complicated by a child support order. A night out leads him to Sierra, an alluring actress who quickly moves in. Their romance sours as Sierra's past as a dancer and her aggressive jealousy come to light.

programme.title: Stick Em Game
programme.desc: Struggling to launch her social media career, Elise decides to switch to viral pranks. When one prank on an old acquaintance goes terribly wrong, a local gang leader is out for revenge. With her best friend’s help, Elise must fight for her life to survive.

programme.title: Restraining Order
programme.desc: A married woman of 10 years, longs for a life of luxury and opulence. An old flame begins to catch her eye as a means to fulfill that dream, at the cost of her jealous husband. He begins to cause a storm of terror, where she fears for her safety.

programme.title: The Hunchback Of Notre Dame
programme.desc: In 15th-century Paris, the brother of the archdeacon plots with the gypsy king to foment a peasant revolt. Meanwhile, a freakish hunchback falls in love with a gypsy dancer.

programme.title: Somewhere In Time
programme.desc: A Chicago playwright uses self-hypnosis to travel back in time and meet the actress whose vintage portrait hangs in a grand hotel.

programme.title: Night Of The Living Dead
programme.desc: A ragtag group of Pennsylvanians barricade themselves in an old farmhouse to remain safe from a horde of flesh-eating ghouls that are ravaging the East Coast of the United States.

programme.desc: El nombre de esta Denominación de Origen de Portugal quiere decir literalmente Vino Verde, por que sus uvas eran tradicionalmente vendimiadas verdes, para evitar los riesgos de la podredumbre.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Si duda alguna el vino más prestigioso de Portugal es el Oporto, su nombre deriva de Porto, que en portugués quiere decir Puerto, o mejor dicho El Puerto en donde los vinos son envejecidos y desde donde eran desde antiguo embarcados a todos los rincones del Mundo.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: La Margen Izquierda de Burdeos es la región más influyente del mundo.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Es difícil recorrer una isla de tantas formas como lo hemos hecho: en todo terreno, a pie, en camello, en drones y hasta debajo del agua.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The SCL Hungary this year is in the AQUAPARK in Budapest, Stage 3 from the spectacular MLO Strongman Champions League, World is Biggest Pro League. With five great events, such as: Viking Press, Farmer's Walk, Deadlift, Conan's Wheel, and A loading race with Beer barrels of 200 Kg. It is a must see!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We're in Zrenjanin, Serbia, again a fantastic stage in the SCL WORLD SERIES TOUR 2024, five events including a super human Yoke race. Who will be the yellow leader for the coming season and take the title with 25 championship points?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We're in Groenlo, east of Holland With the new Talent from South Africa and 2025 Strongest Man of the World - Rayno Nel. The first 3 events are Truckpull, Log Lift and Loading race. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it is the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it is about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland , continues with the last 3 events, here at the venue in Groenlo. The events in this episode are the Conan Wheel, Farmers Walk and the Atlas Stones, with a brutal 200kg stone at the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League: World Record Breakers 2024 kicks off with the Truck Pull, followed by the Front Hold, Frame Carry, Tractor Pull, Shield Carry, Sandbag Toss, and concludes with the intense Loading Race. This two-day competition features all the top strongmen from Finland-and it's one for the history books. Three new world records are shattered, making this a must-see episode for...

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: For the first time in over 10 years back in Estonia, in Tartu. 12 of the Strongest athletes in the world will fight here for the title and the overall world championship points. You will see 5 crazy events, such as: Boat Pull, Viking Press, Medley, Conan's Wheel and a very heavy Power Stairs!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We have returned to Portugal, at the beach of Eposende, to bring you EUROPE'S STRONGEST LATINO. In the beautiful sun of Portugal five cruel events are done in this heat: Truck Pull, Deadlift, Log Lift, Sandbag Toss, Medley.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: A spectacular event on the beach of Gdansk, Poland. A competition in the sand and in the water. Complete with a boat pull. With an impressive line up again, we welcome you to watch us LIVE in the SCL Poland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The Strongman Champions League Train stops in Dubai again for the 3rd time, and is now bigger than ever. Hafthor Bjornsson makes his come back here at the SCL DUBAI. You simply cannot miss this most epic show at the World Trade Center in Dubai part 1.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: After three cruel events in part 1, the World record holder on the deadlift with 501 Kg, will fight for the crown and the title. You simply cant miss this most epic show, at in the World Trade Center in Dubai part 2.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Superhumans arrive in Limassol. Great strongmen from all over the world will compete in the Old Port of Limassol , for the title and championship points. More than ever important this stage, as we come so close to the World Finals in Turkey this year.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: With 12 of the world's best athletes arriving in Cape Town, South Africa, all fighting for the crown and final ranking points ahead of the World Finals in Turkey. Rayno Nel still needs to qualify along with Brian Kichton also battling for a seat in the World Finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This episode contestants fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever. Twelve finalists from all over the world are in Turkey and will fight for the ultimate title: WORLD CHAMPION 2024.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Part 2 of the world final of the Strongman Champions League tour 2024 in Alanya, Turkey. With three Events down and amazing results. Who will be the new World champion?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The Strongman Champions League kicks off its 2014 season in Martinique.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The second stage of 2014 Strongman champions League, in Cologne, Germany. 14 athletes from 12 different countries battled through six events on the second stop

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The third episode is hosted in Serbia where world records are broken!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The fourth episode takes place in Finland with events such as Bus Pull and the forward hold

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next stage of the SCL takes place in Holland with events such as the Atlas Stones and Truck Pull being witnessed

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The SCL is in full swing and the sixth stage takes place in Latvia where the men are eager to break a national record held here

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The competition continues in Portugal with 6 events and thousands of spectators

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Episode 8 takes place in 36 degree heat in Croatia and sees the return of Krzysztof Radzikowski after a 2 month absence due to injury

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL returns to Poland with 12 athletes all battling for the number one title

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The 10th stage takes place in Hungary and features new super talent!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The first ever SCL in Zambia! The athletes get to take in some of the stunning sights and go on to do events such as Tyre Flip and Log Lift

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The competition moves to Romania and for the first time this season the athletes compete in rainy conditions which make the events even tougher

programme.title: Picklebowl 2023
programme.desc: In this charity showdown, Pro pickleball players and celebs will represent their alma maters and battle it out for the Picklebowl 2023 trophy. Hosted by Heisman Trophy winner and former NFL player turned pickleball enthusiast, Danny Wuerffel.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball
programme.desc: December 12, 2023 - Welcome to the second round of the semi-finals for season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Gilbert Gladiators face-off against the Scottsdale Scorchers.

programme.title: DUPR Collegiate Pickleball Tour
programme.desc: Indiana’s Safdar faces Clemson’s Bozzetto in the 2024 DUPR National Championship Women’s Singles Final, battling for collegiate pickleball supremacy in a best-of-three format.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: At the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, J.W. Johnson faces off against Brandon Lane in a hard-fought Men's Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal. With powerful rallies, strategic drops, and relentless pressure, this match highlights Johnson's athleticism and Lane’s grit as they fight for a spot in the finals. Recorded live on Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida.

programme.title: DUPR Collegiate Super Regional
programme.desc: The top-seeded Utah Tech Trailblazers take on a resilient USC squad in a high-stakes semifinal at the 2024 DUPR Nevada Super Regional in Henderson. This match features elite collegiate talent, including Avery Beck—the winningest player in collegiate pickleball history—and the powerful Cameron Bliss, as they look to defend their number-one ranking. Standing in their way is a "pesky" USC team led by Kylie Tran and Hannah Jiang, whose long-standing tennis chemistry translates into a formidable defensive pickleball strategy. With national bids already secured, both teams leave it all on the court for regional bragging rights and a spot in the championship final against Utah State.

programme.title: DUPR Collegiate Super Regional
programme.desc: The DUPR Collegiate Pickleball Virginia Super Regional semifinals deliver high-intensity action as the Clemson Tigers take on the UNC Tar Heels in a bid for the championship. Experience the elite skill of UNC's Sara Carpenter and the "Cinderella" play of Clemson's Fiorella Busetto in a women's doubles match where the lead never feels safe. With "March Madness" energy fueling every rally, the competition heats up as Kyle Compton brings a Dikembe Mutombo-style defensive presence to the court for the Tigers. Broadcast from Performance Pickleball RVA, this match captures the fierce rivalry and championship pedigree of two of the nation's top collegiate pickleball programs.

programme.title: The Wager
programme.desc: Jason Kennedy and Wes Burrows challenge Chandler Parsons and Jenna Bandy.

programme.title: NPL
programme.desc: The Naples JBB United face off against the Boca Raton Picklers in a women's match.

programme.title: DUPR Collegiate National Championship
programme.desc: The "Superpower" FAU Owls look to cement their dominance as they face off against a formidable Utah Valley squad in National Semifinal Number Two. With elite pro-pedigree players on both sides and a spot in the National Championship on the line, witness the tactical precision and high-intensity hand battles that define collegiate pickleball's biggest stage. Experience every commanding lead and resilient comeback attempt as these two giants clash for the right to play for the title.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: Rob Nunnery & Ryler Deheart faced off against Hunter Johnson & Yates Johnson in a quarterfinal match.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: It's the "Southern Derby" in the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Bengaluru takes on Chennai in the second tie of the day, live from the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai. The match features 48 players from six teams and 14 countries, with commentators detailing every crucial point.The tie begins with a thrilling Men's Singles match: Bengaluru's Blaskowitz (a Croatian talent) faces Chennai's Sobek (the Polish national champion). The commentators highlight the extreme patience and dinking skills demonstrated by both players, with Sobek's ability to keep the ball low being a key factor.

programme.title: NPL
programme.desc: The Kansas City Stingers face off against the Seattle United in a group NPL match.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: Watch the Gold Medal match of the Women’s Pro Split Age division at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, where Parris Todd and Beth Bellamy team up to face Sheri Courter and Mari Humberg. Featuring cross-generational strategy, fast hands, and smart positioning, this match highlights the unique synergy of Split Age play. Recorded live from Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida.

programme.title: NPL
programme.desc: The Boca Raton Picklers face off against the Oklahoma City Punishers in a men's match.

programme.title: DUPR Collegiate National Championship
programme.desc: The 2025 DUPR Collegiate National Championship reaches its peak as the University of Florida and the University of Virginia face off in a high-stakes Semifinal and Final showdown. The intensity is palpable from the very first "time in," with athletes showcasing elite precision in specialized Skills challenges and explosive speed during the high-octane Racing segments. Between strategic volleys and creative Freestyle maneuvers, neither side gives an inch as the score oscillates through razor-thin margins, trading momentum with every "right back" play. This clash of titans proves why these two programs are the gold standard of collegiate pickleball, where every "point two" earned is a grueling step toward national history.

programme.title: DUPR Collegiate Super Regional
programme.desc: The 2024 DUPR Georgia Super Regional kicks off with a high-stakes semifinal as the defending champion Clemson Tigers take on Southeastern University at Pickle and Social in Buford, Georgia. Watch as elite collegiate talent, including Fiorella Busetto and Luke Anthony, battle through a grueling match that pushes both teams to the limit. With a spot in the finals on the line, the intensity reaches a fever pitch as the match is decided by a dramatic Dream Breaker. Experience the skill, strategy, and pure passion of top-tier collegiate pickleball in this must-watch regional clash.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: Alix Truong and Megan Fudge take on Parris Todd and Yana Newell in this Women's Pro Doubles Match.

programme.title: NPL
programme.desc: The Kansas City Stingers face off against the Columbus Hotshots in a mixed NPL team match.

programme.title: DUPR Collegiate Pickleball Tour
programme.desc: The DUPR Collegiate National Championship concludes with a thrilling Women's Doubles showdown as the University of Virginia (UVA) takes on Utah Tech. Watch UVA's Alexander McDonald battle Utah Tech's Cammy Bliss and Avery Beck in a high-stakes, best-of-three match.

programme.title: DUPR Collegiate Super Regional
programme.desc: The championship title is on the line as the Clemson Tigers face off against the powerhouse UVA Cavaliers in the DUPR Collegiate Pickleball Virginia Super Regional Finals. Witness an elite tactical battle in women's doubles as Clemson’s Fiorella Busetto and Seeley Feldman showcase their trademark gritty defensive play against the explosive "difference maker" energy of UVA’s Vivian No and Laura Lee Sing Sang. Set in the high-pressure atmosphere of Performance Pickleball RVA, the match tests Clemson's mental fortitude as they attempt a signature come-from-behind charge against a dominant Virginia start. With both squads already securing their bids to Nationals, this showdown is a pure battle for regional pride and championship hardware.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: Watch Jennifer Dawson battle it out for gold against Leslie Bernard in this Women's Senior Pro Singles match at the US Open Pickleball Championships 2023.

programme.title: DUPR Collegiate Super Regional
programme.desc: Top-seeded Utah Tech looks to secure their crown in a high-intensity championship showdown against a resilient Utah State squad at the 2024 DUPR Nevada Super Regional. Watch as star athletes Avery Beck and Benson Perry bring elite paddle skills to the court to fend off a gritty Aggies team that clawed their way into the finals after a miraculous semifinal comeback. The atmosphere in Henderson is electric as these collegiate rivals battle through tactical mixed doubles rallies for regional dominance.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: Dylan Frazier and James Johnson take on Andrei Daescu and Gabriel Tardio in this Men's Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: Live from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025, this pivotal collegiate team match features Kennesaw State (KSU) facing off against Virginia Tech. The action kicks off with a mixed doubles showdown chosen by coin-toss winner Virginia Tech.Watch as Virginia Tech's Cody Miller and Heather Murphy bring their A-game against KSU's Yuri Yadi and Sophia Fiona. The match also features men's doubles with Kellen Funk and Cody Miller representing the Hokies, while Parth Modi and his partner fight to keep KSU's hopes alive. With crucial seeding for bracket play on the line, both teams battle through intense rallies and strategic plays in this pool play matchup.

programme.title: DUPR Collegiate Super Regional
programme.desc: The storied rivalry between the North Carolina Tar Heels and the NC State Wolfpack reaches a fever pitch on the pickleball court during the 2024 DUPR Virginia Beach Super Regional semi-finals. Watch as standout players like Ian Hunter—a 2023 national challenger bracket champion—and Faith Eichner battle against NC State's seasoned duo of Peter Glass and Lauren Hutchinson. With strategic roster shifts and high-stakes rallies, both teams fight for every point to secure regional dominance and avoid a winner-take-all Dream Breaker finale. Experience the intensity of this intrastate clash as North Carolina's premier collegiate talent vies for a spot in the championship match.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: It's Semi-Final Time on Day 9 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL)! This highly anticipated clash pits the Bengaluru Jawans, who finished top of the table (number one seed), against the Hyderabad Superstars, who narrowly snuck into the semi-finals (number four seed) after winning two matches the previous night. This is a classic 1 vs. 4 match-up, with the winner stamping their ticket to Championship Sunday.

programme.title: DUPR Collegiate Super Regional
programme.desc: Witness the ultimate "Gator vs Gator" showdown as the University of Florida's depth is put on full display in the semifinals of the 2024 DUPR Georgia Super Regional. Held at the stunning "compound" facility, Pickle and Social in Buford, Georgia, this match pits teammates against teammates who regularly practice and scrimmage together in Gainesville . Florida 1, led by the aggressive play of Martinez Sunstein and Zoe Rawson, enters the court "hot" after a victory over Miami, while Florida 2’s Adele Dorian and Caitlin Kohn look to prove the minuscule margins between the two squads . From high-paced women's doubles to an electric mixed doubles battle, this episode highlights the incredible rise of collegiate pickleball and the dominant depth of the Florida program as they battle for a spot in the finals .

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: Day 7 of the World Pickleball League brings a critical and dramatic game between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Bengaluru Jawans. The game begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match featuring Mumbai's American star Brandon Lane against Bengaluru's Jack Foster. The match lives up to the hype, showcasing fierce action.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: Catch the collegiate pickleball excitement from Week 2, Day 2 of the NCPA Utah Regional 2025. This intense team match features Utah Tech taking on Utah State as they compete for a national bid to the National Championship in St. Louis, Missouri.The episode features commentary on the exploding growth of college pickleball with college legend and Yola's College Relationship Manager, Timber Tucker. Watch key matchups in men's doubles, women's singles, and the deciding mixed doubles games. Key players include Gavin Fowler (singles 5.2 rating) , Brinley Horton , and Bo Cavell from Utah Tech, as well as standout players Olivia and Brady.

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Only one team can win the £20,000 cash prize, and they could be competing in this week’s heat. A close first round leaves it up to the judges to decide who will progress through the heat.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A newcomer has an aggressive start to their first battle, with no competitor or house robot left unchallenged. Will they make it all the way to final or be punished for their hubris?

programme.desc: Eight of the heat winners gather for the first Semi-Finals. With two rounds to prove themselves, only two robots will make it to the Grand Finals. Competitors show no mercy as they use any means necessary to eliminate their opponents.

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The last chance for combatants to fight for a place in the Grand Final. With the newcomers outnumbering the veterans, will the first timers make up for their lack of experience?

programme.desc: Donna sees a doctor about her suspicions. Eric visits Bill and warns him to stop meddling in his family.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Ridge shows Eric Kristen's swimsuit designs. Ridge is not happy that Thorne wants to remain at Forrester.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Ridge and Margo plan their spring fashion show. Thorne and Brooke discuss Caroline's predicament.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Kristen is nominated for a design award. Eric is pleased. Beth tells Storm about Donna's pregnancy.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Clarke tells Stephanie that he will continue to court Kristen if she will show his design sketches to Eric.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Brooke accompanies Caroline to her trial led by a female judge. Brooke accepts Ridge's lunch invitation.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Brooke has high expectations over her lunch with Ridge but is disappointed when he asks her about Caroline.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Ridge can't accept that things are over between him and Caroline. Stephanie is mystified at Brooke's presence.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Rocco begins work. Ridge and Thorne console Caroline. Brooke tells Storm of her romantic dreams about Ridge.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Stephanie asks Thorne about the Logan family. Brooke tells Dave she is not ready for marriage.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Donna tells Brooke that she isn't pregnant but she and Mark are having problems. Brooke asks about Rocco.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Stephanie plants Clarke at the cafe to meet Kristen and Margo. Dave's testimony sheds suspicion on Ron.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Stephanie advised Ridge to return to Caroline. Thorne comforts Caroline. Bill vows to take revenge on Ron.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Rocco prepares to leave Griffey's. Donna is distraught. Ron's testimony infuriates Caroline.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Kristen is flattered by Clarke's attentions and confides in Ridge who intends to have him checked out.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Ridge and Margo spar over Ridge's feelings over Caroline. Ron's character witnesses heighten his credibility.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Eric is shocked that Ridge will testify. Donna resists Mark's advances. Mark wonders if Rocco is the problem.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Brooke thanks Ridge for testifying on Caroline's behalf. Kristen is amused by Rocco's ambitions.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Kristen learns Thorne intends to propose to Caroline. Donna misses Rocco and calls him at Forrester.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Caroline reveals that seeing Ridge was easier than she thought. Clarke and Stephanie confer on his progress.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Kristen suspects Clarke's motives. Bill threatens violence if Ron is found innocent. Donna explores modeling.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Katie pays a visit to Rocco at Forrester and Ridge asks her to deliver a letter to Caroline.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Brooke contemplates stealing Ridge's letter as Donna tells her about her experience at the agency.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Caroline and Thorne enjoy a romantic evening. Brooke tells Beth that Thorne will propose to Caroline.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Brooke warns Katie not to mention the letter. Kristen tells her parents about her date with Clarke.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Beth thinks that Brooke deliberately kept Ridge's letter from Caroline. Storm tells Dave to be patient.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Caroline and Thorne tell Bill about their engagement as Ridge waits for Caroline in the Private Dining Room.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Stephanie feels that Caroline has treated Ridge unfairly and suspects that Brooke is pleased about that.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Beth urges Brooke not to keep Dave hanging on and warns her that Ridge will soon find out about the letter.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful
programme.desc: Brooke has a fantasy about Ridge and tells Katie. The Logans are happy to be invited to the Forrester home.

programme.title: The Bold And The Beautiful

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E15 - Episode 15
programme.desc: Willem attempts to win back Petra’s trust, as two old lovers reunite. Angelique tries to make things right with Elizabeth, but an old proposal sticks in her throat.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E16 - Episode 16

programme.desc: Pulso del Mercado, con Johny Fernández desde el piso del NYSE y en colaboración con Fintech.TV, ofrece análisis y noticias clave de los mercados financieros en tiempo real.

programme.title: Buenos Días Wall Street
programme.desc: Programa en vivo con análisis del mercado, noticias financieras y entrevistas con expertos.

programme.title: Noticias y Análisis
programme.desc: Resumen informativo con los hechos más relevantes del día y análisis clave del entorno económico, empresarial y social.

programme.title: Moogly: Crocheting over Cord
programme.desc: Learn the many techniques to crochet over cord

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Woven Panel Rolling Hamper Part 1
programme.desc: There is something that has become abundantly clear since having a kid: we make a lot more laundry! Nicole specifically requested something on wheels with double capacity and this is what I came up with. We cut the domino joinery, grooves and panels and do a proof of concept for the woven panels.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: $40 Block Plane
programme.desc: An inexpensive block plane can be tuned and sharpened for better performance.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: MicroJig MJ Splitter SteelPRO
programme.desc: In the past, we have discussed the use of Featherboards & Pushsticks as well as the benefits of using something like MicroJig's GRR-Ripper. But the one safety device we have yet to focus on, which could be considered the most important, is the tablesaw splitter/riving knife.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Choosing the Right Turbine HVLP System
programme.desc: Choosing the right turbine HVLP system can be difficult. If you're looking to get into HVLP spray finishing, the two common routes you can take are either a compressor-driven conversion gun or an all-in-one turbine solution. But with so many brands and so many models within each brand, how do you know which one is right for you?

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Dream Shop Build
programme.desc: Every woodworker (I think!) dreams of someday being able to construct their own dedicated woodworking space. I hope the sharing of my personal experience with you will provide some ideas and inspiration for your own shop, regardless of its size.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Jory Brigham’s Hank Chair
programme.desc: A look at how Jory builds his Hank Chair.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Calendar Frame Part 2
programme.desc: The second and final part of the series focuses on the calendar frame details. We start by creating the front loading slots, then move on to creating the curve in the top rail, and finally we create the small pencil groove in the bottom rail. The frame is then glued up, the back panel is cut and installed and the roundover profile is routed on the perimeter.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Moving Out of the Dream Shop
programme.desc: It seems that I'm gaining something of a reputation as a "frequent shop-mover." It's probably well-deserved since I've moved my shop four times already. If you're playing along with the Where's The Wood Whisperer home game, here's the score so far.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Aging Wood with Baking Soda
programme.desc: While you are probably familiar with the pigment and dye-based stains available on the market, you might not be aware of a whole other class of stains known as chemical stains. Woods like mahogany and cherry are great candidates for chemical staining with baking soda but a wood like maple doesn't have much change, as you'll see in the video.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Hand Tool Basics with Kaleo Kala
programme.desc: A quick review of some basic hand tool techniques with my buddy Kaleo Kala.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Wall-Hanging Tool Chest Part 3
programme.desc: This one is all about assembly! I receive a lot of requests to include more details on my assembly process. This is a detail that many articles, videos, and DVDs tend to leave out, so hopefully this helps to fill some gaps. Keep in mind that every project will require a different glueup and clamping strategy, and this is just one way to get the job done.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Moving Into the Colorado Shop
programme.desc: We are finally getting settled in Colorado so I thought it would be nice to do a little shop update. I strategically staggered the move so that the shop tools would arrive about a week after the house boxes arrived. My hope was that I'd have enough time to get the family settled as well as prep the garage space for the deluge of boxes and tools that were headed its way.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Knock Down Trestle Table Part 1
programme.desc: The table is a trestle design which keeps the legs out of the way and gives us plenty of overhang. The joinery is all mortise and tenon including some cool double wedged mortise and tenon joints. I even added extra supports in the middle of the table that will not only support the top but should also help keep the table top flat over time.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Tenons on the Bandsaw
programme.desc: If you are one of those folks who wants to begin detaching from the tablesaw, you're going to need to find alternative methods for doing the things that we typically use the tablesaw for, such as cutting tenons. Fortunately, the bandsaw is a very good alternative.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Turning a Vampire Stake
programme.desc: Turning on the lathe is one of the most relaxing and enjoyable parts of woodworking. Every time I turn I ask myself, “Why don’t I do this more often?” I still don’t have an answer to that. But recently, I had the opportunity to turn a cool item for a charity event.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Installing Urethane Bandsaw Tires
programme.desc: I've known about urethane bandsaw tires for some time now but never had a need or opportunity to install them, until now.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Why the Jointer Can’t Do it All
programme.desc: Why the jointer can't be used to surface all sides of a board.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: So Excited! The Firehouse is Ours!
programme.desc: We closed on the firehouse. Now what?!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Woodworking in America 2010
programme.desc: This was my first WIA and my expectations were building all year long. I even vowed to skip IWF (the big tool show in Atlanta), just to make sure I could focus all my attention on this education-focused conference. And am I ever glad I did!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Buy This Not That - Measuring and Marking
programme.desc: Tools I think you should buy as well as tools I think you should avoid.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Marking Gauges
programme.desc: If you're not using marking gauges or some sort of blade to lay out your joinery, you are really missing out! I remember a conversation I had with William Ng at the William Ng School when he told me, "If you want to make good joinery, use a pencil. But if you want to make great joinery, using a knife!"

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Avoid Tearout With This Simple Trick
programme.desc: I remember the first time I starting making cuts in wood, I was dismayed by the fact that the cuts were never clean and crisp. Especially when cross-cutting, the wood would tear out at the edge and it was clear I was doing something wrong. After a little research, I realized that experienced woodworkers have numerous tricks they employ to win the battle against tearout.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Mortise and Tenon Options aka Tenons Anyone?
programme.desc: Learn with Marc about the most important and the strongest joints in woodworking - Mortise and Tenon joints.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Interview with Kaleo Kala
programme.desc: A chat with woodworker and designer, Kaleo Kala.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Sculpted End Table Part 4
programme.desc: Time for the fun stuff! The legs are routed and then shaped by hand with a cabinet-maker’s rasp. I then show you how you can use card scrapers and sandpaper to achieve the smoothest finish possible. And finally, we will glue all the legs to the center pieces.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: This Spatula Cost Me $33 000!
programme.desc: Making your own spatula is super easy with $33k worth of tools!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Festool DF 500 Connectors
programme.desc: Like anything Festool, the system isn't cheap. But this Executive Desk is actually going to be my "lifetime" desk and build quality is a big priority, so I decided to give them a shot. The DF 500 Connectors have several configurations but I only needed one for my desk, and that's what I'll show you here.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Double Mortise and Tenon Joints
programme.desc: The mortise and tenon joint is fundamental to good woodworking. There are lots of variations of the mortise and tenon including what I'm going to show you today: the double mortise and tenon joint. The concept is simple. Instead of having one giant mortise and tenon joint, we split it into two.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: YouTube vs Books
programme.desc: Recently, I came across a post in the Wood Whisperer Community Facebook Page where a new woodworker asked for advice on beginner-friendly books. Several folks replied with something like, "Don't waste your money and time, just go to YouTube." Every time you say something like this, a tiny baby bookmark bursts into flames.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Dining Chair
programme.desc: You might recall the Gaming Dining Table I built in season 9. Ever since then, Nicole has been asking repeatedly, "When do I get my chairs?" So I started designing a new chair that I'd eventually batch out for a total of six. The video I've assembled here is a quick look at the process of designing and building the chair.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Drawbored Mortise & Tenon
programme.desc: The mortise and tenon is one of the strongest fundamental joints available to woodworkers, but there are a couple of ways we can make the joint even stronger and longer-lasting.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Tilt-Top Table
programme.desc: Small tables are great skill-building projects. You can pack a lot of joinery and techniques into a very confined space while using a small amount of material. The Tilt-Top Table is a great example of this as it contains a turned post, sliding dovetails, curved and tapered legs, an elliptical top, and a classic shop-made tilt mechanism.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Space-Saving Plywood Cart
programme.desc: A compact plywood cart that saves space and organize full sheets and scraps.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Router-Based Inlay
programme.desc: Inlay is a great way to adorn your woodworking projects. Even the simplest item can become incredibly compelling if it features a well-executed inlay. With the right materials and techniques, its just like painting with wood. Only “non-artistic” folks like myself can actually do it!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Drill Charging Station & DowelMax
programme.desc: I realized I needed a better way to store my drills and chargers. This simple wall-hanging “box” did the trick. I also wanted to make the project fast and easy, so I decided to try out the DowelMax for the first time. The system is a breeze to use and produces strong reliable joints in just a fraction of the time it takes to create a traditional mortise and tenon.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: David Marks Project in Progress
programme.desc: This is a quick tour of David Marks project in progress. David loves to make massive turned sculptures and his current project is a doozie! It’s a huge disc-shaped turned piece featuring a big marquetry image on the front. I hope you enjoy this as much as I did. It’s almost like an episode of Woodworks! Well, sort of.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Gadget Station Part 8
programme.desc: We focus on the back panel system, which includes the installation of rare-earth magnets. I also show how a #7 jointer plane can be very useful in getting a perfectly straight edge on highly figured woods. To make life a little easier, I start gluing up a few sub-assemblies. And you will also see the new Final Cut Blade make an appearance.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: A Sweet Bandsaw Upgrade
programme.desc: A close look at the installation and use of the Laguna DriftMaster Fence System.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Protecting Outdoor Furniture with Epoxy Feet
programme.desc: Mother Nature always wins. So when you make outdoor furniture you have two choices: commit to a regular maintenance schedule or come to terms with the weathered gray look. An easy thing you can do to help the cause is to prevent moisture from entering into the legs. This simple trick requires nothing more than epoxy and masking tape.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Contemporary Clock
programme.desc: Here’s another great small project for the holidays. Its a small Contemporary Clock. This piece should take about two days to build. And this is another project that can benefit from the batching process. So be sure to make a bunch!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Bit Storage Cabinet
programme.desc: A wall-hanging cabinet to help you organize and store your drill and router bits.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Office and Bathroom Firehouse Renovation
programme.desc: Remodeling the firehouse office and bathroom.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Platform Bed - The Headboard
programme.desc: The massive headboard comes together with a wenge raised panel and a beautiful solid bubinga frame!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Moving Again?! Yup!
programme.desc: It's time, once again, to pack up the house and the shop and move to a different state.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Multi-Function Mobile Cart For Festool MFT
programme.desc: A mobile utility cart that does a great job of holding the Festool MFT and accessories.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Gadget Station Part 11
programme.desc: I resaw the spalted maple panels on the bandsaw using Laguna’s Resaw King. What a bandsaw blade! I then glue up the doors and begin creating the ebony plugs for the case. I finish up by showing my process for fitting inset doors.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Outdoor Sitting Bench
programme.desc: A seemingly simple outdoor sitting bench can serve as an excellent learning tool for design. To do it's job, a bench really only needs to have legs and a top. But there are so many things we can do within those initial functional design requirements to make the piece beautiful, elegant, and worthy of your time and effort.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Jewelry Box
programme.desc: This Jewelry Box is designed to pack a lot of storage into a small space. It features five drawers, an upper storage compartment, side compartments, and a hidden drawer. The wood I used is highly figured Walnut and Honduran Mahogany.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Setting Up a Dado Blade
programme.desc: A hassle-free method for setting up a dado blade with no measuring! All it takes is a flat surface and one of the most sensitive measuring devices in your shop: your fingers!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Platform Bed - The Rails
programme.desc: The rails require tenons and some clever hardware solutions!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Adjustable-Height Work Support
programme.desc: Build a simple adjustable-height work support.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: New Festool Tools
programme.desc: Festool recently released two new routers, the MFK700 and the OF2200, and a new multi-function table, the MFT3. Judging from the emails I’ve received, there is a lot of interest in seeing these items on the show. So this one is for you guys!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Low Entertainment Center Part 2
programme.desc: If there is one major negative aspect to working with plywood and other sheetgoods, its the fact that we have to deal with the ugly exposed edges. But with a little know-how and some strips of wood, you can dress up the edges so that only a trained eye can tell that the board is not completely made of solid wood.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Quick High-Quality Shop Cabinets
programme.desc: A new set of custom cabinets with oodles of storage!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Finishing the Arts & Crafts Table
programme.desc: In this episode, Marc shows how to add a curve to the bottom rails and the sides of your arts & crafts table.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Mobile Tool Stand - Quick and Easy!
programme.desc: An easy to build Mobile Tool Stand made with construction lumber and basic tools.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Tricked Out Bandsaws Featuring Carter Products
programme.desc: The bandsaw is one of my favorite tools and if you treat it well, it will quickly become one of your favorites as well. While most modern bandsaws come with decent components, to begin with, there are companies like Carter Products who make high-quality after-market add-ons that can make your bandsaw better performing and easier to adjust. One of the best upgrades you can do is replacing the guide

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Gaming Coffee Table
programme.desc: A coffee table to doubles as a gaming surface!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: A Deep Red Mahogany Finish
programme.desc: A deep red mahogany finish doesn’t have to be the result of a complicated process. I’ll show you how I use a simple two-step method to revitalize my mother in law’s old beat up rocking char. First, a coat of General Finishes Merlot Water-Based Dye. Second, a coat of General Finishes Brown Mahogany Gel Stain. Its all finished off with a nice satin lacquer topcoat.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Low Entertainment Center Part 5
programme.desc: I assemble and attach the base, install the handles, and apply the final finish to the top. This project was an incredible learning experience, and not in the way you might think. I actually found it challenging to step back from my primary shop tools, and focus only on the portable power tools. I have a new found appreciation for the tools I have been taking granted for years.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: The Firehouse is Finally a Shop!
programme.desc: The Firehouse is Finally a Shop! Walls, Lights, & Thank YOU!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Rustic Outdoor Table - Joinery and Assembly
programme.desc: A beautiful rustic table made from Western Red Cedar featuring Domino XL joinery.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Planing Thin Strips
programme.desc: Safely planing thin strips and surfacing thin stock using a shop-made planer sled.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Gadget Station Part 4
programme.desc: In this video, I focus on cutting the joinery for the case sides, as well as cutting the square holes for the ebony plugs. I discuss at length, various ways of doing both operations and I cover some basic chisel techniques, including how to deal with a very dense wood like bubinga. And you won’t want to miss the public service announcement at the beginning!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Grasshopper Pull Toy
programme.desc: This fun little pull toy is easy to make. The great thing about it is you can get your child involved in the process at whatever level you're comfortable with. Older kids can cut and sand the parts. Younger kids can paint and assemble the grasshoppers.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: SketchUp Basics - Trunk Lid Part 1
programme.desc: Its no secret that Google SketchUp is a very popular program amongst woodworkers. Considering what it does, its incredibly easy to use. But it can still be intimidating to someone who is using it for the first time. So with the help of my buddy Aaron Marshall, we put together a few videos showing how to construct the square lid to the Steamer Trunk.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Sculpted End Table Part 3
programme.desc: I start by gluing the leg blanks to the aprons. I then cut the rough shape out on the bandsaw. And finally, I use the template and a flush trim bit in the router table to get the exact shape we’re after. I also spend a good deal of time discussing the dangers involved with this routing operation.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: How to Sharpen a Gooseneck Scraper
programme.desc: I'll show you the method I use to get a nice burnished hook on my curved and gooseneck scrapers.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Shop Evolution Update
programme.desc: In the past, I’ve discussed how shop improvements are never done. As our needs and tool preferences change, the shop has to be able to adjust accordingly. If not, you will likely be faced with an inefficient and potentially unsafe work environment.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Cutting Thin Strips at the Table Saw
programme.desc: Resawing thin stock and cutting thin strips is typically the domain of the bandsaw. And while I consider the bandsaw to be an essential shop tool, not everyone has one. So it's probably worth considering an alternative option that kills two birds with one stone: utilizing a more common tool that results in a smoother cut.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Pet Steps
programme.desc: Sometimes our pets need a little help getting to high places like the family bed or the inside of a vehicle. This easy-to-build set of Pet Steps can also serve as a ramp and even stores flat when not in use. Made with simple materials and basic tools, anyone can knock this project out in a weekend.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Shop Heating Options
programme.desc: One of the biggest changes I have to adapt to after moving to Colorado is the need for heat. In fact, it's been at least 15 years since heat has been anything more than an afterthought. So I had my work cut out for me as I researched shop heating options and weighed that against my budget and what makes sense for my personal situation. So here's a quick rundown of the options I considered.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Gadget Station Part 1
programme.desc: For the first time ever, I am using mail-ordered wood. This material came from Bell Forest Products and I was very impressed with the quality. The shipment came in two packs and contained some really nice wide bubinga boards, as well as a piece of ebony for the trim and some spalted maple for the doors.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Woodworker's Guide to Glue
programme.desc: My attempt at demystifying the world of wood glue.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Cheap Effective Chisel Sharpening
programme.desc: This is a simple method to get started sharpening without breaking the bank.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Turning a Tiny Finial
programme.desc: A few months ago, renowned turner Ashley Harwood came out to visit the shop. Coincidentally, my new Powermatic 3520C lathe has just arrived. What better way to break in the new lathe than to have an expert give it a solid workout.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Woven Panel Rolling Hamper Part 1
programme.desc: There is something that has become abundantly clear since having a kid: we make a lot more laundry! Nicole specifically requested something on wheels with double capacity and this is what I came up with. We cut the domino joinery, grooves and panels and do a proof of concept for the woven panels.

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Moving Into the Colorado Shop
programme.desc: We are finally getting settled in Colorado so I thought it would be nice to do a little shop update. I strategically staggered the move so that the shop tools would arrive about a week after the house boxes arrived. My hope was that I'd have enough time to get the family settled as well as prep the garage space for the deluge of boxes and tools that were headed its way.

programme.title: Love at the Christmas Table
programme.desc: Family friends Sam and Kat spend every Christmas Eve at the Children's Table. They grow up together, sharing the highs and lows of young adulthood. And at thirty, Sam realizes that Kat is the one... but he's afraid that the past will get in the way.

programme.title: The Challenge of the Lady Ninja
programme.desc: During the Japanese occupation of Shanghai, a Chinese woman trains in the covert arts. When she arrives in Hong Kong, she learns that her brother works on behalf the Japanese cause. She then pulls together a team of women warriors to stop her brother

programme.title: Dark Space
programme.desc: When their shuttle is damaged on the way to Centari Five, six friends are forced to crash land on the surface of a mysterious alien planet. Stranded with little hope of rescue, it soon becomes clear that they are not alone. Hunted by the planet's ferociou

programme.title: The Avenging Eagle
programme.desc: Eagle Chief Yoh Xi-hung raises orphans to be his personal killers. One such is Chik Ming-sing who now wants to put his killer life behind him. When the Eagle Clan come after him, a stranger called Cheuk comes to his assistance It turns out that Cheuk is the son of a family who were robbed and murdered by the Eagles. Now they will team up to destroy the evil clan.

programme.title: Wow Signal
programme.desc: On a late summer evening in 1977, Ohio radio astronomers discovered a strong, interstellar signal that is believed by many to be the best evidence of communication from an extraterrestrial civilization.

programme.title: Creative Crochet Corner presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Creative Crochet Corner is an online video streaming service all about learning how to crochet! Whether you're a new to crochet just learning the basics or an experienced crocheter looking for a challenge, Creative Crochet Corner is here to help. We offer a vast library of video tutorials taught by talented crochet experts who guide you through each technique step-by-step, sharing their best tips and tricks.

programme.title: Fresh Quilting
programme.desc: Triangles and wedges are the building blocks of modern quilts. Color enthusiast Rebecca Bryan creates graphic quilt samplers with bold-colored triangles. Quilters Kara Sanders and Elizabeth Dackson talk about organizing quilting retreats that refuel creative energy. Designer Christina Cameli uses 10-degree triangles to create a versatile blocks for a variety of modern designs.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: In this season finale, Angela does a little flower arranging (quilter's style!) to create Monique Jacobs' beautiful Bouquet quilt.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: From cornstarch to cuticle pushers, Angela shares five ingenious hacks for using common household items for quilting.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela ponders on her new year's resolutions as she builds a curved log cabin quilt using ombré fabric.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Learn how to dress up your wardrobe in this episode. Joanne Banko looks at the details in making an original pashmina wrap using trim and embroidery. Then Meg Healey has pattern alterations to take a dress from one to two pieces as a style or fit choice. Finally meet June Mellinger for block #2 and flying geese – this season we’ll have 3 variations of this favorite design.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Add style, movement and interest to your designs. Multi-media artist Mary Hettmansperger adds personality, function and style to her designs with hinges. Candie Cooper returns to Katie's Beading Lesson with cute stretchy beaded rings that are fast and easy to make for teens and tweens.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: Energize your creativity by adding power. Cheryl Boglioli gets into the groove with a cool stenciling tool. May Flaum adds texture with sewing machine stitches. Cheryl Boglioli shares a painting tip. Joe Rotella lights up lettering with twinkling lights.

programme.title: Make It Artsy
programme.desc: An artist sees things differently -- they have a unique way of looking at the world and interpreting it into art. First, we look at Mary Cassatt, an American painter and printmaker known for her portrayal of women and children and create a project showing the bonds between mother and child. Using a totally different perspective, Joe Rotella, creates a kaleidoscope guaranteed to alter the way you see the world. We finish up with Ardith Goodwin and a Kandinsky inspired work -- starting with a photo of a house and using chalk and neon to create her canvas.

programme.title: National Sewing Circle presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Learn to sew, step-by-step with National Sewing Circle experts on CraftsyTV.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela shows you how to make half-square triangles two at a time for a dazzling quilt that's beaming with color.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela creates a modern Southwestern-style quilt that's the perfect size to use as a blanket for summer picnics in the park.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Ready to find your center? Tonight, Angela becomes one with the piecing as she makes a stress-relieving half-square triangle quilt.

programme.desc: Angela raids her husband's closet to stitch up a special quilted Father's Day gift. This T-shirt quilt for Jeremy isn't just any old T-shirt quilt; it's a very cool design that uses big flying geese to frame the blocks.

programme.desc: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.

programme.desc: Welcome to Artists's Academy where we are dedicated to making you a better artist. We believe everyone has an artist within, waiting to be unleashed.
